title: Maa Kali Mantra
intro: Read the Kali Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive the grace of Mother Kali.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Kreem Kalikayai Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Goddess Kalika.

faq.q1: When should Maa Kali Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Maa Kali Mantra may be chanted in the morning, during midnight spiritual practice, or during special worship with devotion.
faq.q2: How many times should Maa Kali Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Maa Kali Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring courage, freedom from fear, protection from negative influences, spiritual strength, and the blessings of Maa Kali.
faq.q4: Can Maa Kali Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Maa Kali Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Maa Kali Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Maa Kali Mantra with faith and devotion.
